name: Barbarian
description: Durable frontline warrior powered by rage and physical resilience.

name: Bard
description: Versatile support spellcaster whose expertise and inspiration shape the party.

name: Cleric
description: Divine spellcaster focused on support, protection, restoration and sacred power.

name: Druid
description: Primal spellcaster with nature magic, transformation and battlefield control.

name: Fighter
description: Martial specialist with broad weapon training and reliable tactical resources.

name: Monk
weaponProficiencies: Martial Melee Weapons with Light property
description: Mobile martial artist using discipline, speed and precise unarmed attacks.

name: Paladin
description: Armored divine warrior combining martial pressure, healing and protective auras.

name: Ranger
description: Explorer and hunter blending martial skill, tracking and primal magic.

name: Rogue
description: Skill specialist built around expertise, mobility and precise attacks.

name: Sorcerer
description: Innate arcane caster who reshapes spells through a personal magical resource.

name: Warlock
description: Pact-bound caster combining repeatable invocations with compact spell resources.

name: Wizard
description: Prepared arcane caster with the broadest spellbook and strong ritual utility.
